summary: Comprehensive test of new payment workflow. Backend: 39/39 tests pass (21 regression + 18 new payment). Frontend: end-to-end DP flow verified (order create -> awaiting_payment -> bank tab -> upload proof -> submit -> payment_review -> seller verify-accept -> in_progress -> deliver -> 'Setuju & Lanjut Pelunasan' -> awaiting_settlement -> settlement payment section). Admin payment settings page (/admin/pembayaran) loads and persists.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 823 lines - consider splitting into modules (orders, payments, settings, auth, admin) for maintainability
Payment validation tolerance of 95% is permissive - documented and tested, acceptable for now
Bank/QRIS/E-Wallet info exposed in public /api/settings/payment endpoint - intended for buyer payment page, no auth needed; verify this is the desired exposure
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (updated TestHappyPath, TestNegotiation, TestRevisionQuotas to insert pay+verify step after buyer accept since status now transitions to awaiting_payment)

/app/backend/tests/test_payment.py (NEW: 18 tests covering settings, payment-mode computation, awaiting_payment transition, submit validation, verify accept/reject, DP settlement E2E, full payment E2E, backward-compat /finish)
seed_data_creation: Test orders auto-cleaned after each test via DELETE /api/admin/orders/{code}. Payment settings seeded to BCA/1234567890/Test Owner during admin_put_persists test (left in place for frontend tests).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend payment endpoints all functional: /settings/payment (GET pub, GET admin, PUT admin), POST /orders/track/<t>/payment, POST /admin/orders/<c>/verify-payment, POST /orders/track/<t>/request-finish, POST /orders/track/<t>/finish (alias). 4 new statuses tested: awaiting_payment, payment_review, awaiting_settlement, settlement_review. Buyer accept now goes to awaiting_payment (started_at=null) rather than in_progress directly. Frontend: buyer payment section, copyable rows (bank/account/holder/nominal/order-code), upload+submit, admin verification card, /admin/pembayaran all confirmed working via Playwright E2E.
